---
title: "R to SQL Learning"
format: html
---



## Window Functions

### R Output

R version:

```{bash}
cd /Users/jaredflater/Projects/jared-ai-ml-lab/sql_practice && cat 01_window_window_functions.r 
```
```{bash}
cd /Users/jaredflater/Projects/jared-ai-ml-lab/sql_practice && Rscript 01_window_window_functions.r
```

### SQL

```{bash}
cd /Users/jaredflater/Projects/jared-ai-ml-lab/sql_practice && cat 01_window_functions.sql
```
```{bash}
cd /Users/jaredflater/Projects/jared-ai-ml-lab/sql_practice && duckdb lcs_data.duckdb < 01_window_functions.sql
```

## Rank Care Events

### R Output
```{bash}
cd /Users/jaredflater/Projects/jared-ai-ml-lab/sql_practice && Rscript 02_rank_care_events.r
```

### SQL
```{bash}
cd /Users/jaredflater/Projects/jared-ai-ml-lab/sql_practice && duckdb lcs_data.duckdb < 02_rank_care_events.sql
```
